title: Cryptool featured on Yahoo Finance and Business Insider
content_html:
Cryptool was picked up by major business and finance outlets this week, including Yahoo Finance, Business Insider Markets and Investor Observer.

The coverage marks the start of our broader marketing push and a series of AMA sessions to introduce the platform to a wider audience. If you have a community that would benefit from Cryptool, this is a good moment to spread the word.
author: Cryptool
